arts.ttl: Leeds star left in tears after 'horrendous' error that was 'worst in 30 years'
arts.sum: Leeds United's French goalkeeper was left disconsolate after his 96th minute error which gifted Sunderland a share of the spoils in the Championship clash at the Stadium of Light

arts.ttl: Sunderland's Alan Browne pokes fun at Leeds United's Ilan Meslier with 'embarrassed' admission
arts.sum: Browne's cross, of sorts, bounced in front of the Leeds goalkeeper, who looked dumfounded as it went through his hands and between his legs into the back of the net. Sunderland's Alan Browne says he's embarrassed to claim his equaliser against Leeds United, not that it will stop him.

arts.ttl: 'What has he done?!' | Meslier's extraordinary howler costs Leeds late on!
arts.sum: Leeds United goalkeeper Illan Meslier had a moment to forget as he failed to collect the simplest of takes that somehow spilled past him and into his goal that costs Leeds three points as they draw 2-2 to Sunderland.

arts.ttl: 'What has he done?!' | Meslier's extraordinary howler costs Leeds late on!
arts.sum: Leeds United goalkeeper Illan Meslier had a moment to forget as he failed to collect the simplest of takes that somehow spilled past him and into his goal that costs Leeds three points as they draw 2-2 to Sunderland.

arts.ttl: Meslier's incredible mistake gifts Sunderland dramatic point
arts.sum: Leeds goalkeeper Illan Meslier gifted Championship leaders Sunderland a point on Friday night as his glaring error in the 97th minute ensured the promotion rivals drew 2-2.

arts.ttl: Illan Meslier's error gives Sunderland perfect late gift from Leeds: 'He chucked it in'
arts.sum: SUNDERLAND 2-2 LEEDS UNITED: Daniel Farke's side looked set to take all three points at the Stadium of Light - before Illan Meslier's 96th minute howler handed the hosts a share of the spoils

arts.ttl: Leeds United player ratings as awful Meslier error robs side of Sunderland win
arts.sum: Chris Rigg opened the scoring early in the first half after he bundled in a rebound following a good Illan Meslier save. Leeds United came away from Wearside with their second draw of the week after late drama robbed them of a priceless win.

arts.ttl: Illan Meslier’s late error hands Sunderland a point against Leeds
arts.sum: A draw leaves Sunderland two points clear at the top of the table.

arts.ttl: Sunderland 2-2 Leeds United highlights as visitors robbed of win by late Meslier error
arts.sum: Sheffield United vs Luton Town (3pm) Championship schedule

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Sunderland as Daniel Farke turns heads with two changes on Wearside
arts.sum: Sam Byram, one of the few experienced, trusted options still in reserve for Farke, may have hoped to give Junior Firpo or Jayden Bogle a breather, but he remains on the bench. Leeds United: Illan Meslier; Jayden Bogle, Joe Rodon, Pascal Struijk, Junior Firpo; Ao Tanaka, Joe Rothwell; Wilfried Gnonto, Brenden Aaronson, Largie Ramazani; Joel Piroe.
